name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/send_message_operation_count
definition: Number of publish message operations per topic. Core publish throughput signal. DEPRECATED but present in Tsuga.
absence_means: No messages being published or GCP integration not configured

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/send_request_count
definition: Number of publish requests grouped by response_code and response_class. Key error signal for publishing.
absence_means: No publish requests or integration not configured

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/send_request_latencies
definition: Distribution of publish request latencies in microseconds.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/message_sizes
definition: Distribution of publish message sizes in bytes.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/byte_cost
definition: Cost of operations measured in bytes. Includes publish and transform costs.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/config_updates_count
definition: Count of configuration changes on a topic.
absence_means: No config changes (normal in steady state)

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/num_unacked_messages_by_region
definition: Number of unacknowledged messages across all subscriptions for a topic by region.
absence_means: All messages acked or no subscriptions exist

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/oldest_unacked_message_age_by_region
definition: Age of oldest unacknowledged message in a topic by region in seconds.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/num_retained_acked_messages_by_region
definition: Number of acknowledged messages retained in a topic by region.
absence_means: Retention not enabled or messages expired

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/unacked_bytes_by_region
definition: Total bytes of unacknowledged messages in a topic by region.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/num_retained_messages
definition: Number of messages retained in a topic.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/retained_bytes
definition: Total byte size of messages retained in a topic.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/topic/oldest_retained_message_age
definition: Age of oldest message retained in a topic in seconds.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/sent_message_count
definition: Number of messages sent to subscribers. Core consumption throughput.
absence_means: No delivery activity or subscriber not connected

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/byte_cost
definition: Cost of subscription operations measured in bytes.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/pull_request_count
definition: Number of pull requests with response_code and response_class labels.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/pull_message_operation_count
definition: Number of pull message operations. DEPRECATED but present in Tsuga.
absence_means: No pull subscribers or empty responses

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/streaming_pull_response_count
definition: Number of streaming pull responses with response_code and response_class.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/streaming_pull_message_operation_count
definition: Number of streaming pull message operations. DEPRECATED but present in Tsuga.
absence_means: No streaming pull subscribers or no messages

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/ack_message_count
definition: Number of messages acknowledged by subscribers.
absence_means: No acks (subscriber not processing or not connected)

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/config_updates_count
definition: Count of configuration changes on a subscription.
absence_means: No config changes (normal in steady state)

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/num_undelivered_messages
definition: Number of undelivered messages (backlog). THE primary subscription health gauge.
absence_means: Backlog empty - healthy or no messages published

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/oldest_unacked_message_age
definition: Age of oldest unacknowledged message in seconds. Primary delivery lag indicator.
absence_means: No unacked messages - fully caught up

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/backlog_bytes
definition: Total size of undelivered messages in bytes.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/num_retained_acked_messages
definition: Number of acknowledged messages retained for replay via Seek.
absence_means: Retained acked messages not enabled or all expired

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/retained_acked_bytes
definition: Total size of retained acknowledged messages in bytes.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/expired_ack_deadlines_count
definition: Number of messages with expired ack deadlines (redelivered).
absence_means: All messages acked within deadline - healthy

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/exactly_once_warning_count
definition: Number of exactly-once delivery warnings. Present only when exactly-once is enabled.
absence_means: Exactly-once delivery not enabled or no warnings

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/ack_latencies
definition: Distribution of ack latencies in milliseconds.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/open_streaming_pulls
definition: Number of open StreamingPull streams per subscription.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/pull_ack_request_count
definition: Number of pull ack requests with response_code and response_class.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/snapshot/config_updates_count
definition: Count of configuration changes on snapshots.

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/push_request_count
definition: Number of push requests. Key push health signal. NOT FOUND in current Tsuga instance (no push subscriptions).

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/push_request_latencies
definition: Distribution of push request latencies in microseconds. NOT FOUND in current Tsuga instance (no push subscriptions).

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/dead_letter_message_count
definition: Number of messages forwarded to dead letter topic. NOT FOUND in current Tsuga instance (no DLT configured).

name: pubsub.googleapis.com/subscription/delivery_latency_health_score
definition: Composite health score (0-1). NOT FOUND in current Tsuga instance.
absence_means: Metric not available in this Tsuga instance

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Pub/Sub does not expose direct cost metrics. Proxy: topic/byte_cost and subscription/byte_cost correlate with data processing costs.
